title: 'The patience for Hezbollah's actions has worn out', analyst says
author: FRANCE24
fullText:
To display this content from YouTube, you must enable advertisement tracking and audience measurement.

08:01 
 
 
 
 
 Issued on: 03/03/2026 - 21:54
summary: Speaking with FRANCE 24's Mark Owen, Hussein Ibish, Senior Resident Scholar at the Arab Gulf States Institute, says that "as time has gone on and as Hezbollah has repeatedly dragged the country into war, the patience of everyone else for this excuse 'well, we're fighting Israel, so it's ok' has worn out".
